title: Tranquil Accessories
description:
A Simple Minecraft Mod Created To Have A Lot More Decoration And Fun Things! Implrementing New Buildings, Furniture, Plushies And A Lot More! 

Even Comes With A Tiny Bit Of Lore Of How The Plushies Became A Thing! 

W.I.P
body:
A Simple Minecraft Mod Created To Have A Lot More Decoration And Fun Things! Implrementing New Buildings, Furniture, Plushies And A Lot More!

The Plushies Come In A Lot Of Variety! Such As A Lot Of Different Streamers! Friends Of Mine And Some Lore Plushies From The Mod Itself! (Random charecters)

It Has Advancements That You Can Get From Completing Or Finding Some Of The Plushies (One Of The Plushies Are Completely Uncraftable And Only Way To Obtain It Is Through Creative Or Finding It In A Structure!

Even Comes With A Tiny Bit Of Lore Of How The Plushies Became A Thing! 

W.I.P
